Biography
James Baskerville was the eldest son of Sir John Baskerville and Elizabeth Touchet.

His year of birth is unknown and is estimated as c 1435.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James Baskerville於1436年出生在英國賀福爾易亞迪斯利時，他的父親John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville28歲，母親Reina Elizabeth Touchet26歲。他於1455年與Sibyl Devereux在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1499年1月28日在他的家鄉享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir James Baskerville于1436年出生在英国賀福爾易亞迪斯利时，他的父亲John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville28岁，母亲Reina Elizabeth Touchet26岁。他于1455年与Sibyl Devereux在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1499年1月28日在他的家乡享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Baskerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Boscherville in Eure, France, named with Old Anglo-Norman French boschet ‘copse, thicket’ (a diminutive of Bois ) + ville ‘settlement, town’.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James Baskerville was born in 1436, in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, his father, John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville, was 28 and his mother, Reina Elizabeth Touchet, was 26. He married Sibyl Devereux in 1455, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 28 January 1499, in his hometown, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James Baskerville est né en 1436, à Eardisley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Reina Elizabeth Touchet, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Sibyl Devereux en 1455, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 28 janvier 1499, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir James Baskerville 1436 in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville 28 und seine Mutter Reina Elizabeth Touchet 26. Er hat 1455 in England, United Kingdom Sibyl Devereux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Januar 1499 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Baskerville è nato il nel 1436 nel Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Reina Elizabeth Touchet, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Sibyl Devereux nel 1455, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 28 gennaio 1499, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir James Baskervilleが1436年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエアルディスリーで生まれた時，父John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskervilleは28歳，母Reina Elizabeth Touchetは26歳であった。1455年にイギリスイギリスでSibyl Devereuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1499年1月28日に故郷で63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir James Baskerville(이)가 1436년 영국 허퍼드실르 에르디슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Reina Elizabeth Touchet(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1455년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sibyl Devereux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1499년 1월 28일 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Baskerville nasceu em 1436, em Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Reina Elizabeth Touchet, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibyl Devereux em 1455, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de janeiro de 1499, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James Baskerville родился в 1436 г. в местности эардисли, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Reina Elizabeth Touchet, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibyl Devereux в 1455 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 28 января 1499 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir James Baskerville nació en 1436, en Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Reina Elizabeth Touchet, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sibyl Devereux en 1455, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 28 de enero de 1499, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años.
